title: Marmayogi
actors: Pandari Bai, Anjali Devi, Madhuri Devi
plot: Urvasi (Anjali Devi), is the young mistress of a king (Serukalathur Sama). With the help of her own lover (S. A. Natarajan), she pushes the king off a boat and usurps his powers. Urvasi appoints herself as the new queen regnant, a...
